posts.text:
Odd that Sen. Britt literally objects to funding Coast Guard, Secret Service, and TSA, when ICE and Border Patrol are fully funded.


Senator Katie Boyd Britt (@SenKatieBritt)

Daily reminder that Democrats blocked funding for HOMELAND SECURITY including the Coast Guard, Secret Service, and TSA.

ICE and CBP are still funded and will continue to deport criminal illegal aliens.



— https://nitter.net/SenKatieBritt/status/2034618641661251883#m

posts.text:
The breathtaking mediocrity of Senator John Fetterman: 

He doesn't show up to votes.

He doesn't do committee work.

He cosplays as working class, even though he's a trust fund baby.

He bullies interns in the hallway.

What am I missing?

posts.text: Hearing @AdrianSaenz has started a new direct mail firm in Spanish. Odd since he doesn't speak Spanish. Los pinches hacks are a huge reason why Dems keep losing Latinos. It's a question of trust. Adrian inspires none. Dems need to finally change up.
